headline: 🎯 CUET GAT Mock Test 01 - Uploaded!
notification: Exciting news! The CUET General Ability Test (GAT) Mock 01 is now live. For your convenience, the test is available in both English and Hindi languages. Start your practice now!

headline: 📱 Official Mobile App Launching Soon!
notification: We are bringing the platform to your fingertips! Our official mobile app for Android and iOS is launching very soon. Stay tuned for a smoother and faster learning experience.

headline: 📢 Important Update: Back on Track Tomorrow!
notification: I was caught up with some urgent work today, but everything will be back on schedule tomorrow. In the meantime, feel free to use the Chat Panel to discuss your doubts and chat with others. Thank you for your support!
